description: ServiceNow MCP server — 450+ tools (ITSM, ITOM, CMDB, scripting) for Claude, ChatGPT & any AI.
name: io.github.aartiq/nowaikit

environmentVariables.description: Enable CMDB write operations (true/false, default: false)
environmentVariables.name: CMDB_WRITE_ENABLED

environmentVariables.description: Enable Now Assist AI features (true/false, default: false)
environmentVariables.name: NOW_ASSIST_ENABLED

environmentVariables.description: Enable ATF test execution (true/false, default: false)
environmentVariables.name: ATF_ENABLED

environmentVariables.description: Role-based tool package: full, service_desk, platform_developer, etc.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_TOOL_PACKAGE

environmentVariables.description: Transport mode: stdio (default), sse, or http
environmentVariables.name: TRANSPORT

environmentVariables.description: HTTP server port (default: 3000, for sse/http transport)
environmentVariables.name: PORT

environmentVariables.description: Bearer token for API authentication (sse/http transport)
environmentVariables.name: NOWAIKIT_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Enable Fluent SDK tools (true/false, default: false)
environmentVariables.name: FLUENT_ENABLED

title: NowAIKit — ServiceNow MCP Server
